waivers.reason: solo developer — second reviewer does not exist yet
waivers.note: While W-001 is active, the GitHub ruleset settings listed in platformDeferred stay OFF so the sole CODEOWNER (= PR author) is not deadlocked; the plan-compliance gate applies the waiver-aware approval logic instead. On W-001 expiry or when a second person joins, require_code_owner_review and required_approving_review_count>=1 MUST be enabled on the ruleset.
